regulations.title: FSSAI License Renewal Period
regulations.description: FSSAI license must be renewed every 12 months before expiry to avoid late fees.

regulations.title: State License Turnover Threshold
regulations.description: Food businesses with turnover above ₹12L but below ₹20Cr need a State license instead of basic registration.

regulations.title: FSSAI Annual Return Due Date
regulations.description: Annual return in Form D1 is due by May 31 every year.

regulations.title: Penalty for Late Annual Return
regulations.description: A penalty of ₹100 per day will be levied for delay in filing the Annual Return beyond May 31st.
